heading: Nonappropriated fund instrumentalities: contracts with other agencies and instrumentalities to provide and obtain goods and services
label: 2492 Nonappropriated fund instrumentalities: contracts with other agencies and instrumentalities to provide and obtain goods and services
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2492 was renumbered .section 2489 of this title

Amendments2014— substituted “Federal department, agency, or instrumentality—” for “Federal department, agency, or instrumentality to provide or obtain goods and services beneficial to the efficient management and operation of the exchange system or that morale, welfare, and recreation system.” and added pars. (1) and (2).Pub. L. 113–2912004— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 108–375section 2482a of this title

children.text: to provide or obtain goods and services beneficial to the efficient management and operation of the exchange system or that morale, welfare, and recreation system; or
to provide or obtain food services beneficial to the efficient management and operation of the dining facilities on military installations offering food services to members of the armed forces.
